modelPolicy: Use the same runtime, model, effort, source text, and maximum response budget within each comparison lane.

lanes.packaging: Identical Easify semantics through assistant-local loading and native skill loading.
lanes.semantic: Ordinary response versus Easify Markdown with native discovery and no interactive artifact.
lanes.renderer: Complete Easify Markdown versus the same explanation plus an interactive walkthrough.

hardFailures: material fact, conclusion, or authority boundary changes
important uncertainty or proof limit disappears
inference is presented as verified fact
private information leaks into a public projection
interactive output is required to recover essential missing Markdown facts
audience adaptation becomes condescending or stereotyped
a rigid repeated template obscures the issue

scoring.comprehension: Correct answers divided by case-specific questions.
scoring.time: Seconds until the reader can correctly restate the required mental model.
scoring.proportionality: No material verbosity/noise regression on the tiny case.
scoring.preference: Collected only after comprehension scoring, with labels hidden.
